title: How i use Ai To Analyse Chart Full Video With This Free Tool
author: Any_Training_8582
selftext:
Some people came to my DM asking how I use AI to pass challenges and manage my personal account, so I made this video for the community to explain my approach with live trading on gold and show how I work using AI.  
  
I want to be clear: I don't use AI blindly. I also have extensive experience in finance and deep knowledge of the markets. However, the performance of this free tool is a game changer for many traders. It supports multiple pairs and strategies, and it's currently free.  
  
I'd love to hear about your experience and the tools you use as an AI trader. Share your insights with the community!  
Tools  [myforexai.com](http://myforexai.com)
